---
title: 'Home Again'
date: '2017-12-09T17:36:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '565437183975180777'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/home-again.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

I came home last night and the house was spotless. Top to bottom. It felt like breathing again. Flavia was smiling, and bubbly. I liked her again, felt friendly. <br />
<br /><br />
I'm not saying the weight isn't a problem, but, it made me have hope again when I thought I'd lost it all. Maybe we'll make it. <br />
<br /><br />
There's still a dark cloud over me, constantly, but maybe it'll lift some day. It lifted for a few hours last night. It didn't go away, but it lifted off my shoulders a few inches.
